The Ancient Method

From Pasture to
Golden Ghee

1
Milk from healthy, grass-fed Gir cows.
2
Milk set into curd overnight.
3
Curd hand-churned to extract white butter (makkhan).
4
Makkhan slow-clarified over a gentle flame.
5
Golden, aromatic ghee poured into glass jars.
Why A2 Gir Ghee

Powerful Health
Benefits

01
Heart Health
Rich in Omega-3 & Omega-9 fatty acids that support cardiovascular health.
02
Gut Health
Butyric acid supports digestion, gut lining integrity, and microbiome balance.
03
Immunity Boost
Fat-soluble vitamins A, D, E & K strengthen immunity and bone health.
04
High Smoke Point
Ideal for cooking, frying & baking without releasing harmful compounds.
05
Easier Digestion
A2 beta-casein protein is significantly easier to digest than conventional A1 milk proteins.
06
Anti-Inflammatory
Reduces inflammation, supports joint mobility, skin radiance, and overall wellness.
07
Brain Function
Healthy fats support cognitive development and sustained mental clarity.
08
Satvik & Vedic
Prepared by the ancient Bilona method — pure, natural, and spiritually revered.
About KEIVORA

Rooted in Truth,
Given with Grace.

KEIVORA A2 Gir Cow Ghee is made from the pure milk of indigenous Gir cows, grass-fed on sun-drenched pastures. We follow the ancient Vedic Bilona method — milk is first set into curd, hand-churned to extract white butter (makkhan), then slow-clarified over a gentle flame.

No cream-separation. No shortcuts. Just 25–30 litres of A2 milk transformed into one litre of pure, aromatic, golden ghee.

Storage Instructions

Keeping it pure

Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
Always use a clean, dry spoon to avoid contamination.
No refrigeration required — keeps at room temperature.
Best consumed within 12 months of manufacturing date.
Once opened, consume within 3 months for best flavour.
Keep lid tightly closed after every use.
